concerns.detail: Text contains profanity ('jb', 'b人') and unsupported personal insults including '走狗' (lackeys), '装圣人' (pretending to be a saint), and '别给脸不要脸' (shameless), constituting pure personal attacks rather than criticism of concrete advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 被这个b人坑害的学生...把你跟你的走狗一波带走...还在这RP装圣人呢...别给脸不要脸
